case_title: MEREDITH, ROGER L. VS SPARKS, ANTONIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,694.71 FILED BY MEREDITH, ROGER L. AS TO DEFENDANT SPARKS, ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2006, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT SPARKS, ANTONIO
ON AUG. 7, 2006 DEFT WAS OR'D AND GIVEN A NEW COURT DATE OF AUG. 31, 2006. HOWEVER ON AUG. 14, 2006 A PROOF OF NON SERVICE WAS FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEREDITH, ROGER L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPARKS, ANTONIO $6,694.71 PRINCIPAL, $127.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,821.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
